summary: Minimal symbol-map fix for GALE01: the function at .text:0x8038E034 was renamed from the placeholder AXDriver_8038E034 to the identified HSD_AudioGetAuxHeapSize, preserving its function metadata size 0x2D8 and global scope.

smart_moves: Made a narrowly scoped one-line correction in the symbol map instead of touching unrelated AXDriver entries.

decomp_lessons: When a function identity is known, update config/GALE01/symbols.txt from address-based placeholder names to semantic names while preserving exact address and metadata.
Small symbol-map corrections are valuable for searchability and future decomp work even when they do not affect matching code directly.
Audio-related HSD functions may appear among AXDriver-addressed placeholder names; verify the address before renaming.
naming_conventions: Use HSD_AudioGetAuxHeapSize for the global function at .text:0x8038E034.
AXDriver_8038E034 was treated as a placeholder/address-derived name and replaced by the identified HSD_Audio* style name.
The neighboring unresolved symbols retain the AXDriver_<address> naming pattern.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: No assembly matching changes were present.
The useful tactic here was symbol association: bind the known function name HSD_AudioGetAuxHeapSize to existing address .text:0x8038E034 without altering function size or scope.
